message:
Add unittest support: TestCase instantiation, cleanup fix

- unittest.zig: Use .init(allocator) for TestCase instantiation
- cleanup.zig: Don't free class_name (AST slice, not owned)
- Add test_unittest_basic.py unit test

Unit tests: 24 passed, 0 failed

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+import unittest
+
+class TestAssertions(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_equal(self):
+        self.assertEqual(1, 1)
+        self.assertEqual("hello", "hello")
+
+    def test_true(self):
+        self.assertTrue(True)
+        self.assertTrue(1 == 1)
+
+    def test_false(self):
+        self.assertFalse(False)
+        self.assertFalse(1 == 2)
+
+unittest.main()
